TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Hupu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 56 buwan, 167 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 66% kyan ku 111 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 34% kyan ku 56 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 16%, Sakizaya 1%, Bunun 3%, Tayan 1%, Truku6 %, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hupu hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Hupu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Hupu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hupu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hupu hya' ga Lalumaang. tay mkyahu' na Hupu hya' ga Palinkaan. tay 'llaw na Hupu hya' ga Paudadan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ Д§upu ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku kariЕ‹ keЕ‹ atu s~Й•inК¦~КЁima ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa ** ОІuwan, *** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku ** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, amis~Й• **%, s~Й•akizaja *%, ОІunun *%, tajan *%, truku* %, pajwan *%, ОІinaД§ liД§ujan s~Й•К”uli *%. maki qu Е‹as~Й•al ОІziran, Е‹as~Й•al ps~Й•atu teЙЈami ru pqniqan iju. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na Д§upu Д§jaК” ЙЈa ОІs~Й•iluЕ‹. taj К”zil na Д§upu Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax. taj mkjaД§uК” na Д§upu Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na Д§upu Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na Д§upu Д§jaК” ЙЈa lalumaaЕ‹. taj mkjaД§uК” na Д§upu Д§jaК” ЙЈa palinkaan. taj К”llaw na Д§upu Д§jaК” ЙЈa pau*a*an. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й• tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
S.FORM: alang Hupu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 56 buwan, 167 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 66% kyan ku 111 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 34% kyan ku 56 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 16%, Sakizaya 1%, Bunun 3%, Tayan 1%, Truku6 %, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hupu hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Hupu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Hupu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hupu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hupu hya' ga Lalumaang. tay mkyahu' na Hupu hya' ga Palinkaan. tay 'llaw na Hupu hya' ga Paudadan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ Д§upu ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku kariЕ‹ keЕ‹ atu s~Й•inК¦~КЁima ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa ** ОІuwan, *** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku ** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, amis~Й• **%, s~Й•akizaja *%, ОІunun *%, tajan *%, truku* %, pajwan *%, ОІinaД§ liД§ujan s~Й•К”uli *%. maki qu Е‹as~Й•al ОІziran, Е‹as~Й•al ps~Й•atu teЙЈami ru pqniqan iju. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na Д§upu Д§jaК” ЙЈa ОІs~Й•iluЕ‹. taj К”zil na Д§upu Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax. taj mkjaД§uК” na Д§upu Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na Д§upu Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕ‹. taj mkrajaК” na Д§upu Д§jaК” ЙЈa lalumaaЕ‹. taj mkjaД§uК” na Д§upu Д§jaК” ЙЈa palinkaan. taj К”llaw na Д§upu Д§jaК” ЙЈa pau*a*an. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й• tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
